result.text:
✨ NEW DROP ALERT ✨

It's been 2 weeks since I last minted on @objktcom, especially in The Happey Valley collection by @saucebook! Been focused on Salvor before, but now it's time for something new!

"Alone Outside" 🌙

🔹 Edition: 10/10
🔹 Price: 5 Tez
🔹 Link: https://t.co/fUKC4F2svX

— 🎨 —

Sometimes I sit alone,
watching the endless sky.
The wind brushes my face,
but the silence stays.

I think about many things,
about today and tomorrow.
But the answers are blurry,
like shadows on still water.

I want to talk,
but I don’t know to whom.
So I stay quiet,
waiting for night to replace the day.

— 🌌 —

Collect if it speaks to you. RTs & support mean the world! 💙🔥 #objkt #Tezos #NFTart
